e57d259b-syriac-smoke.description: Single-page smoke test: 18 lines of Christian Sogdian (Syriac script) from C2AV Berlin plate, annotated in session e57d259b. Train=val=holdout (same page) — only verifies the pipeline end-to-end, not model quality.

metadata.notes: Smoke test for RunPod train-remote pipeline. Trains from scratch (no base model) because no Syriac .safetensors base exists. catmus is Latin-only (wrong script). 2 epochs, --quit fixed. Expected cost: a few cents on RTX 3090 spot.
